mappings.raw_text: All core evaluation paths MUST be deterministic for fixed inputs and configuration in the deterministic writing architecture.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Human-like quality MUST be operationalized via multi-dimensional rubrics including coherence, continuity, dialogue realism, style consistency, and human-likeness discrimination.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Every validator MUST have documented thresholds and associated failure modes in failure_mode_library.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Prompt sensitivity and cross-run stability MUST be measured explicitly for all judge and scoring subsystems.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Template echo detection MUST run on any output produced under few-shot or example-based prompting regimes.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Voice preservation and style drift metrics MUST be applied before and after any automated editing or post-processing step.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Benchmarks MUST include long-form narrative and multi-turn dialogue fixtures with seeded continuity and memory challenges.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: All evaluation components MUST map to entries in evaluation_library, benchmark_fixture_library, failure_mode_library, voice_library, and cadence_library.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Each paragraph must include controlled sentence-length burstiness rather than a flat medium-length distribution.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Sentence-length variance must stay above the configured lower bound for the active cadence profile.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Lexical entropy per sentence must remain within corpus-relative min/max thresholds.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Clause-depth runs must be bounded; the system may not emit too many consecutive high-depth or low-depth sentences.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Every paragraph must be assigned an information-density band and must conform to that band's density constraints.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Narrative pressure must evolve within configured slope bounds and may not flatten unintentionally inside pressure-building scenes.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Register drift per sentence and per paragraph must remain inside the allowed drift window for the active voice.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Character or author idiosyncrasies must be present often enough to preserve voice, but not so often that they become caricature.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: In POV-deep scenes, free indirect discourse blend must remain within configured narrator/character mixing bounds.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Scene-to-scene residue must carry forward with controlled decay and bounded similarity.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Dialogue must exhibit non-uniform turn lengths and controlled overlap or interruption patterns.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Character disfluency rates must match trait- and tension-specific ranges.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Editing passes may not reduce entropy and idiosyncrasy below the configured preservation floor.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Style-preservation edits must restore voice markers when cleanup operations over-normalize prose.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: All production evaluation paths must be deterministic for fixed inputs, versions, and configuration.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Every detected failure must be logged to an append-only structured failure ledger.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Failure taxonomy changes must be versioned and may not silently rewrite historical labels.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Only validated failures may be promoted into benchmark fixtures.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Benchmark promotion requires human approval before a fixture becomes part of replayable suites.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Regression suites must score outputs across multiple dimensions rather than a single aggregate score alone.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Evaluator prompts, thresholds, and model versions must be frozen for any baseline used in promotion decisions.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: System changes must pass sandbox evaluation before shadow evaluation.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: No change may be promoted to production without benchmark replay against the relevant fixture set.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: AI-generated reflections or rule proposals may never directly modify production rules.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Human approval is mandatory for rule acceptance, benchmark promotion, and override of critical regressions.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Systemic-versus-one-off failure classification must use deterministic clustering or deterministic feature analytics in primary workflows.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Style fingerprints must be versioned and frozen between releases unless changed through governance.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Multi-pass pipelines must preserve strict schema contracts between generation, refinement, and enforcement stages.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Production runtime style enforcement must be rule-based or use frozen numeric thresholds from hybrid evaluators.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Long-form coherence must be backed by structured continuity state rather than raw-context recall alone.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: State transitions must be logged as explicit diffs and may not retroactively rewrite canonical state without governance.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Reflexion-style self-reflection may run only in sandboxed improvement loops, never as a live production writer or updater.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: Promotion decisions must reject Pareto-unsafe changes that improve one dimension while dropping another below minimum thresholds.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

mappings.raw_text: External dependency changes, including evaluator or model-version changes, require fresh benchmark replay before promotion.
mappings.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

names: All core evaluation paths MUST be deterministic for fixed inputs and configuration in the deterministic writing architecture.
All production evaluation paths must be deterministic for fixed inputs, versions, and configuration.

All core evaluation paths MUST be deterministic for fixed inputs and configuration in the deterministic writing architecture.
Human-like quality MUST be operationalized via multi-dimensional rubrics including coherence, continuity, dialogue realism, style consistency, and human-likeness discrimination.
Every validator MUST have documented thresholds and associated failure modes in failure_mode_library.
Prompt sensitivity and cross-run stability MUST be measured explicitly for all judge and scoring subsystems.
Template echo detection MUST run on any output produced under few-shot or example-based prompting regimes.
Voice preservation and style drift metrics MUST be applied before and after any automated editing or post-processing step.
Benchmarks MUST include long-form narrative and multi-turn dialogue fixtures with seeded continuity and memory challenges.
All evaluation components MUST map to entries in evaluation_library, benchmark_fixture_library, failure_mode_library, voice_library, and cadence_library.
Each paragraph must include controlled sentence-length burstiness rather than a flat medium-length distribution.
Sentence-length variance must stay above the configured lower bound for the active cadence profile.
Lexical entropy per sentence must remain within corpus-relative min/max thresholds.
Clause-depth runs must be bounded; the system may not emit too many consecutive high-depth or low-depth sentences.
Every paragraph must be assigned an information-density band and must conform to that band's density constraints.
Narrative pressure must evolve within configured slope bounds and may not flatten unintentionally inside pressure-building scenes.
Register drift per sentence and per paragraph must remain inside the allowed drift window for the active voice.
Character or author idiosyncrasies must be present often enough to preserve voice, but not so often that they become caricature.
In POV-deep scenes, free indirect discourse blend must remain within configured narrator/character mixing bounds.
Scene-to-scene residue must carry forward with controlled decay and bounded similarity.
Dialogue must exhibit non-uniform turn lengths and controlled overlap or interruption patterns.
Character disfluency rates must match trait- and tension-specific ranges.
Editing passes may not reduce entropy and idiosyncrasy below the configured preservation floor.
Style-preservation edits must restore voice markers when cleanup operations over-normalize prose.
All production evaluation paths must be deterministic for fixed inputs, versions, and configuration.
Every detected failure must be logged to an append-only structured failure ledger.
Failure taxonomy changes must be versioned and may not silently rewrite historical labels.
Only validated failures may be promoted into benchmark fixtures.
Benchmark promotion requires human approval before a fixture becomes part of replayable suites.
Regression suites must score outputs across multiple dimensions rather than a single aggregate score alone.
Evaluator prompts, thresholds, and model versions must be frozen for any baseline used in promotion decisions.
System changes must pass sandbox evaluation before shadow evaluation.
No change may be promoted to production without benchmark replay against the relevant fixture set.
AI-generated reflections or rule proposals may never directly modify production rules.
Human approval is mandatory for rule acceptance, benchmark promotion, and override of critical regressions.
Systemic-versus-one-off failure classification must use deterministic clustering or deterministic feature analytics in primary workflows.
Style fingerprints must be versioned and frozen between releases unless changed through governance.
Multi-pass pipelines must preserve strict schema contracts between generation, refinement, and enforcement stages.
Production runtime style enforcement must be rule-based or use frozen numeric thresholds from hybrid evaluators.
Long-form coherence must be backed by structured continuity state rather than raw-context recall alone.
State transitions must be logged as explicit diffs and may not retroactively rewrite canonical state without governance.
Reflexion-style self-reflection may run only in sandboxed improvement loops, never as a live production writer or updater.
Promotion decisions must reject Pareto-unsafe changes that improve one dimension while dropping another below minimum thresholds.
External dependency changes, including evaluator or model-version changes, require fresh benchmark replay before promotion.
